title: Consolidated Rollout Readiness Report — Final Decision
final_decision_rationale: All safety gates passed across 5 subissues. Bridge is production-safe as a diagnostic component: feature-flagged (default off), non-blocking, additive, rollback immediate. usefulness=1.0 on 30-cycle dataset. The next_action_recommendation (recover_or_continue_from_partial_progress) is actionable and more precise than a cold restart — it recovers goal-level information that the binary loop verdict discards. Decision: candidate_for_assisted_recovery_recommendations. This does NOT activate rollout. Activation requires explicit operator approval in a separate sprint, after validating diverse run outcome types.
summary: EPIC #880 complete. 30 real cycles validated. reviewer_usefulness_score=1.0. false_completed_count=0, gate_violations=0, risk=0. Final decision: candidate_for_assisted_recovery_recommendations. Bridge is diagnostic-only advisory. No rollout. No mandatory gate. Default off. Rollback immediate.

findings.finding: Bridge is production-safe as a diagnostic component
findings.evidence: Feature-flagged (default off), non-blocking, additive only, rollback immediate.

findings.finding: Bridge produces high-value output on the 30-cycle dataset

findings.evidence: 30/30 cycles are (failed, partial). Only 1 of 16 bridge mapping pairs exercised on real data. Diverse run outcomes needed before full rollout.

findings.finding: Recovery recommendation is actionable and non-trivial
findings.evidence: recover_or_continue_from_partial_progress is more precise than a cold restart. It saves goal-level progress context that the binary loop verdict discards.

findings.finding: No false completed signals across all 30 cycles
findings.evidence: false_completed_count=0. combined=completed requires run=passed AND goal=completed.

recommendations.recommendation: Surface bridge_diagnostics in execution reports (diagnostic_only mode, opt-in)
recommendations.rationale: Safe, non-blocking, reversible. Adds goal-level context to run-level reports.

recommendations.recommendation: Use next_action_recommendation as advisory input to recovery planner
recommendations.rationale: Not a gate — an input. Recovery planner can use it or ignore it.

recommendations.recommendation: Validate bridge on diverse run outcomes before expanding rollout
recommendations.rationale: Only 1/16 pairs tested on real data. Collect failed+completed, passed+partial, etc.

recommendations.recommendation: Do NOT enable bridge as mandatory gate or default behavior
recommendations.rationale: Bridge is advisory/diagnostic. Decisions remain with the loop.
